ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the music streaming app */,
  "size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the app in bytes */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the app */,
  "prime_genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the app */,
  "rating_count_tot" INTEGER /* Total number of user ratings */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average user rating */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., '4+', '9+', '12+') */,
  "supported_devices" TEXT /* JSON array of supported devices */,
  "languages" TEXT /* JSON array of supported languages */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the app's initial release */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_prime_genre FOREIGN KEY ("prime_genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of app downloads */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the app */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* JSON array of user feedback */,
  "bug_reports" TEXT /* JSON array of bug reports */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object of rating distribution */,
  "engagement_time" INTEGER /* Average time users spend in the app (in minutes) */,
  "churn_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who stop using the app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_performance_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "developer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "developer_website" TEXT /* Website of the developer */,
  "developer_description" TEXT /* Description of the developer's background and expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitor_apps" (
  "competitor_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor app */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor app */,
  "competitor_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the competitor app */,
  "competitor_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the competitor app in bytes */,
  "competitor_rating_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the competitor app */,
  "competitor_rating_count" INTEGER /* Total number of user ratings for the competitor app */,
  "competitor_downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the competitor app */,
  "competitor_active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users for the competitor app */,
  "competitor_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the competitor app */,
  "competitor_release_date" TEXT /* Date of the competitor app's initial release */,
  "competitor_last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the competitor app */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_app_id")
)
column_names: Name of the music streaming app
Size of the app in bytes
Date of the app's initial release
Date of the last update to the app
